structural_description: The frame is divided into four quadrants, each containing a drawing of a different type of cell or tissue. The drawings are labeled with their respective cell types and nuclei colors.
layout: The frame is divided into four quadrants, each containing a drawing of a different type of cell or tissue. The drawings are labeled with their respective cell types and nuclei colors.
spatial_map: The drawings are arranged in a 2x2 grid, with each quadrant containing a different type of cell or tissue drawing.
colors_styles: The drawings are in black and white, with different colors used to label the cell types and nuclei.
